title: Pirojpur Heat Wave
lead: Pirojpur is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.77. The city's temperature has reached extremely high levels, causing concern for residents.
body:
The current heat wave in Pirojpur has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating a severe anomaly. 
 The heat wave is characterized by high temperatures, with a CDD of 12.2 GG, and high humidity levels at 77%. 
 The wind speed is moderate, at 19.9 km/h, but is not providing significant relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to protect residents and infrastructure.
